name: Cyera
description: AI-native classification; multi-cloud and SaaS agentless discovery; strong shadow and dark data detection.
notable_for: Classification accuracy, shadow data, AI-native approach

name: Sentra
description: Data lineage and business context mapping across cloud-native data flows between identities and environments.
notable_for: Data lineage, business context, cloud-native pipelines

name: Symmetry Systems
description: Graph-based object-level visibility; fine-grained permissions and identity-to-data mapping for Zero Trust environments.
notable_for: Zero Trust, data sovereignty, graph-based identity mapping

name: Concentric AI
description: Semantic Intelligence engine using deep learning and NLP; classifies unstructured text, collaboration data, and AI prompts beyond regex.
notable_for: Unstructured data, semantic classification, AI prompt governance

name: Wiz
description: DSPM integrated into the Wiz Security Graph; data risk mapped to infrastructure misconfigurations and active attack paths.
notable_for: CNAPP integration, toxic combination detection, infrastructure context

name: Palo Alto (Prisma Cloud)
description: DSPM coupled with CIEM and development lifecycle tracing within the Prisma Cloud CNAPP platform.
notable_for: CNAPP breadth, CIEM integration, enterprise platform consolidation

name: SentinelOne
description: DSPM within Singularity Cloud Security; connects runtime threat detection with data posture for automated isolation.
notable_for: Runtime threat + data posture, automated response

name: Orca Security
description: Agentless CNAPP with native DSPM scanning; combines data exposure with workload security controls.
notable_for: Agentless CNAPP, workload + data risk correlation

name: BigID
description: Data intelligence at scale across hundreds of data sources; privacy operations, compliance reporting, and DSAR handling.
notable_for: Connector breadth, privacy ops, compliance reporting, legacy data estates

name: Varonis
description: Behavioral analytics on data access patterns; real-time DDR and automated least-privilege remediation across file shares and cloud.
notable_for: DDR, behavioral analytics, unstructured data, automated remediation

name: Securiti.ai
description: Data Command Center blending DSPM with AI governance, DSAR automation, and structured privacy compliance workflows.
notable_for: AI governance, DSAR, privacy compliance, Data Command Center

name: Thales (Imperva)
description: DSPM discovery paired with native protection controls: inline encryption, tokenization, and dynamic data masking.
notable_for: Native protection controls, encryption, tokenization, compliance

name: Spirion
description: Automated discovery and classification frameworks across hybrid environments; long-standing accuracy focus.
notable_for: Classification accuracy, hybrid coverage, long-standing platform

name: Netwrix
description: Access auditing, change tracking, and risk minimization across structured data environments and legacy systems.
notable_for: Access auditing, change tracking, legacy structured data

name: OpenText
description: Data posture and classification within a broader information management and enterprise cybersecurity portfolio.
notable_for: Information management, enterprise portfolio, lifecycle discovery

name: Microsoft Purview / Defender DSPM
description: Native data classification and posture across Azure, Microsoft 365, and Copilot environments; expanding to non-Microsoft clouds.
notable_for: Microsoft ecosystem depth, Copilot governance, bundled licensing

name: IBM Guardium
description: Modern cloud data posture capabilities integrated with enterprise risk management in the Guardium suite.
notable_for: Enterprise risk management, IBM ecosystem, database security

name: Cyberhaven
description: DSPM + DLP unified platform tracing data lineage dynamically as employees create, move, or modify files across endpoints and cloud.
notable_for: Data lineage, DLP integration, endpoint + cloud unified view

name: DataStealth
description: Inline network-layer approach; real-time discovery, posture, and tokenization without agents or code modifications. Strong for mainframes.
notable_for: No-agent network-layer approach, mainframe coverage, data residency

name: Rubrik
description: DSPM built into the backup stream; classification and ransomware risk analysis on existing snapshot data with no production overhead.
notable_for: Cyber resilience angle, no production overhead, backup-integrated

name: Cohesity
description: Backup-stream DSPM with classification and malware risk analysis on snapshot data; same cyber resilience angle as Rubrik.
notable_for: Cyber resilience, backup-integrated classification, no production overhead
